title: starlight.creative.studio.v1 Input Schema
description: Input parameters for Starlight AI Creative Studio. Caller provides a creative prompt and optional style configuration. The core multi-model pipeline, prompt engineering strategy, and style transfer logic run entirely on the Responder side and are never exposed.

prompt.description: Natural language description of the desired creative output. Can include subject, mood, composition, or narrative direction.

style_preset.description: Named style preset to apply. Available presets are defined by the Responder's internal style library.

quantity.description: Number of output variations to generate. Higher values increase execution time.

reference_image_hint.description: Optional role name of the reference image attachment to use as style or composition guidance.
